howItWorks.intro: This bug-out bag weight calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total Weight = Sum of all category weights
Body Weight % = (Total Pack Weight ÷ Body Weight) × 100
Target: 15-20% of body weight for civilian use
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How heavy should a bug-out bag be?
faq.answer: Target 15-20% of your body weight. For a 170 lb person, that's 25-34 lbs. Military standard is 30% for trained soldiers, but civilians should aim lighter. Over 25% severely impacts mobility.

faq.question: What are the essentials for a 72-hour bag?
faq.answer: Priority order: Water (1 gallon/day), shelter (tarp/bivy), fire-starting, first aid, food (2,000+ cal/day), navigation, knife/multi-tool, flashlight, extra socks, rain gear, and documents.

faq.question: How can I reduce bug-out bag weight?
faq.answer: Replace heavy items with ultralight alternatives. Carry a water filter instead of all 3 days of water. Use a tarp instead of a tent. Choose calorie-dense foods. Eliminate duplicates and 'just in case' items.

faq.question: Is the Bug-Out Bag Weight Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Bug-Out Bag Weight Calculator?
sections.body: The Bug-Out Bag Weight Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your your body weight, water weight, food weight, you get instant results including total pack weight, percentage of body weight, weight assessment. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting total pack weight right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your your body weight and need to find the right total pack weight. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Your Body Weight (lbs)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your your body weight — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: water weight, food weight, shelter/sleep gear, fire/light gear, first aid/hygiene, tools/navigation, extra clothing. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your total pack weight, percentage of body weight, weight assessment. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.
